subcodes.first_line: Thy letter reached the Wronged One in the Most Great Prison, and that which was inscribed therein was presented by the servant who stood in His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت در سجن اعظم نزد مظلوم حاضر و آنچه در او مسطور عبد حاضر معروض داشت
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
